CapabilityClass.description: Capability classes supported by the v1 runtime registry.
CapabilityClass.title: CapabilityClass

CapabilityHint.description: Hints that a capability can use when ranking providers.
CapabilityHint.title: CapabilityHint

CapabilityPatch.description:
Request body for PATCH /v1/admin/capabilities/{id}.

All fields are optional — only supplied fields are merged.
CapabilityPatch.title: CapabilityPatch

CostMode.description: Cost estimator selection for admission and reconciliation.
CostMode.title: CostMode

InferenceRequest.description:
Request body for POST /v1/inference.

The ``capability_id`` field accepts a capability name or registry id.
All other fields are passed through to the selected RunPod provider
verbatim after capability-specific validation.

capability_id.description: Capability name or ID to invoke
capability_id.title: Capability Id

dry_run.description: Run routing and cost estimation without calling RunPod
dry_run.title: Dry Run

InferenceRequest.title: InferenceRequest

InferenceResponse.description:
Response body for POST /v1/inference.

Returns the RunPod result verbatim for the selected provider surface.
InferenceResponse.title: InferenceResponse

dry_run.description: Run routing and cost estimation without creating a pod
dry_run.title: Dry Run

LeaseEndpoints.description: HTTP and TCP endpoints observed for a pod lease.
LeaseEndpoints.title: LeaseEndpoints

LeasePatch.description:
Request body for PATCH /v1/leases/{id}.

All fields are optional — only supplied fields are merged.
change_set validation (L16) rejects requests that simultaneously
change multiple axes (image, GPU, volume).
LeasePatch.title: LeasePatch

LeaseReadiness.description: Readiness signals required before a lease can become active.
LeaseReadiness.title: LeaseReadiness

LeaseResponse.description: Response body for GET /v1/leases/{id} and POST /v1/leases.
LeaseResponse.title: LeaseResponse

LeaseTcpEndpoint.description: TCP proxy endpoint exposed by RunPod for a lease.
LeaseTcpEndpoint.title: LeaseTcpEndpoint

ProviderPatch.description:
Request body for PATCH /v1/admin/providers/{id}.

All fields are optional — only supplied fields are merged.
ProviderPatch.title: ProviderPatch

ProviderType.description: RunPod provider surfaces supported by Pitwall.
ProviderType.title: ProviderType

ResultDelivery.description: Requested result delivery path for a capability default.
ResultDelivery.title: ResultDelivery

WebhookSecretRotationResponse.description: Secret rotation response; the new secret is never listable later.
WebhookSecretRotationResponse.title: WebhookSecretRotationResponse

WebhookSubscriptionCreate.description: Input schema for creating a webhook subscription.
WebhookSubscriptionCreate.title: WebhookSubscriptionCreate

WebhookSubscriptionCreated.description: Creation response containing the signing secret exactly once.
WebhookSubscriptionCreated.title: WebhookSubscriptionCreated

WebhookSubscriptionResponse.description:
Output schema for webhook subscription read operations.

The hmac_secret is explicitly excluded to prevent accidental exposure.
WebhookSubscriptionResponse.title: WebhookSubscriptionResponse

get.description: Dependency readiness; unlike liveness, returns 503 on dependency loss.
